'''lamoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcm|mcm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcm|mcm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lamoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læmeteth|læmeteth]] || [[word:læmetej|læmetej]] || [[word:læmetesh|læmetesh]] || [[word:læmete|læmete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lamomototh|lamomototh]] || [[word:lamomotoj|lamomotoj]] || [[word:lamomotosh|lamomotosh]] || [[word:lamomoto|lamomoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lamototh|lamototh]] || [[word:lamotoj|lamotoj]] || [[word:lamotosh|lamotosh]] || [[word:lamoto|lamoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lamoftoth|lamoftoth]] || [[word:lamoftoj|lamoftoj]] || [[word:lamoftosh|lamoftosh]] || [[word:lamoftof|lamoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lamototho|lamototho]] || [[word:lamotojo|lamotojo]] || [[word:lamotosho|lamotosho]] || [[word:lamotoko|lamotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lamototh|lamototh]] || [[word:lamotoj|lamotoj]] || [[word:lamotosh|lamotosh]] || [[word:lamoto|lamoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lamotothol|lamotothol]] || [[word:lamotojol|lamotojol]] || [[word:lamotoshol|lamotoshol]] || [[word:lamotokol|lamotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lamotothotho|lamotothotho]] || [[word:lamotojojo|lamotojojo]] || [[word:lamotoshosho|lamotoshosho]] || [[word:lamotoko|lamotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lamotothon|lamotothon]] || [[word:lamotojon|lamotojon]] || [[word:lamotoshon|lamotoshon]] || [[word:lamotokon|lamotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lamotothoro|lamotothoro]] || [[word:lamotojoro|lamotojoro]] || [[word:lamotoshoro|lamotoshoro]] || [[word:lamotokoro|lamotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
